             iM sO siGmA

The game is super fun, and the community really stands out. It’s awesome to be part of such a positive and friendly environment where people genuinely connect and support each other.That being said, I’ve noticed that sometimes people can be a bit annoying when they constantly beg for moderator roles, even when it’s clear they’re not going to get it. It kind of takes away from the fun vibe. I think the community could be even better if there was a way to address this without it becoming a distraction.Thanks for making such a great game.

reviews.review_title: Y’all gotta stop asking for mod
reviews.review_description: Come on bro, you’ve probably asked hundreds of times for mod and never got it. They don’t give free mod to random people. And you need to be trusted for the role of moderator, because you might be a toxic 12 year old that bans everybody for no reason. There is no point asking for mod they are not giving it to you please stop asking for mod. It’s very irritating and irrelevant and annoying for me and the people who ask like you. Just please quit asking for mod you will never get it and may be black listed (banned) from every getting mod and possibly bannned forever please quit asking for mod.
